title: Cyber Ghost
logline: A hacker known as "Cyber Ghost" leaks proof of city council corruption, then vanishes. Days later, the whistleblower is found dead — and the leak trail looks deliberately staged.

setting.primary_location: A mid-sized U.S. city (present day) — City Hall, a co-working space, a data center/ISP hub, and the victim’s apartment
setting.timeframe: Present day; critical 10-day window from leak to death

premise.victim_profile: Anonymous whistleblower/hacker operating under the alias "Cyber Ghost"
premise.cause_of_death: Suspicious death initially framed as overdose/suicide
premise.inciting_event: Cyber Ghost publishes a cache of financial records exposing a corrupt city council’s kickback scheme, then goes silent

suspects.name: The Council Fixer
suspects.role: Political operator tasked with containing scandals, known for off-the-books intimidation

suspects.name: The Rival Hacker
suspects.role: Competing hacktivist who claims Cyber Ghost stole their exploit and endangered their network

suspects.name: The Insider
suspects.role: City IT/finance employee with privileged access who may have fed the documents

suspects.name: The Close Contact
suspects.role: Someone in the victim’s personal life who knew the alias and had access to their devices

digital_evidence_targets: Blockchain/crypto payment trail or donation wallet metadata
Email headers / secure message transcripts (Signal/Matrix) with redactions
City procurement PDFs, invoices, and vendor payment summaries
ISP or co-working access logs / keycard timestamps
Device forensics summary (laptop/phone) + browser history anomalies
Social media rumor thread / local journalist DMs

spatial_tool.concept: Optional: simplified floor plan of the victim’s apartment + building entry camera coverage

trojan_horse.concept: A boring municipal document (print queue log / copier audit page / routine IT ticket) that proves the leak files were accessed from inside City Hall after the public ‘leak’ went live
trojan_horse.purpose: Creates a hard timestamp contradiction that reframes motive and reveals an internal cleanup operation

tone.style: procedural, document-driven, grounded cyber details (no magic hacking)

idea: A hacker known as "Cyber Ghost" exposes a corrupt city council's financial records, then disappears. Days later, the whistleblower is found dead. Was it revenge from the politicians, a rival hacker, or something more personal?
